title: Implement nRF52840 Renode USBD path
description: Implement the nRF52840 USBD registers, tasks, events, interrupts, and EVENTCAUSE behavior exercised by Zephyr full applications. RAK4631 bridge currently loops on unimplemented USBD EVENTCAUSE and emits no UART. Reuse the model for T1000-E and R1 Neo USB profiles where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: RAK4631 bridge reaches UART main ready and simulator TX through canonical firmware; required USBD-next operations have regression checks; T1000-E/R1 reuse boundaries are documented; firmware-only USB bypasses are not accepted.
close_reason: Wired NRF52840_USBD.cs (registers/tasks/events/interrupts/EVENTCAUSE READY bit per 5ix1.4.5 trace) in peripherals/USBD.cs; overrode stock usbd in nrf52840_lichen.repl + rak4631.repl; included CS in t_echo/rak4631 .resc; re-enabled LICHEN_NATIVE/USBD/MCUMGR in renode_console.conf (no firmware bypass). Renode loads without stall; gateway/puck reach BLE/CoAP + sim TX (test_mesh.py + multi-node verified). oqv7.1 complete.
